risk_title: National Housing Policy Delay Blocking Provincial Policy Development
risk_summary: Development of Punjab's Affordable Housing Policy has been put on hold pending notification of the federal government's national housing policy. This creates uncertainty in the enabling environment and may reflect governance coordination challenges between federal and provincial levels.
evidence_quote: The federal government is in the process of developing a national housing policy. The development of an Affordable Housing policy for Punjab has thus been put on hold until the national housing policy is notified.
